docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $356.49 FILED BY PARIS, SYDNEY AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CSC - LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE] FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARIS, SYDNEY AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) {HEARING DATE: DECEMBER-02-2022 AT 10:00AM] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-11-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL - SUBMITTED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS DENIED - UNTIMELY.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SYDNEY PARIS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, REPRESENTED BY JEAN MAGALHAES, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPERANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
SC-109 - AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [JEAN MAGALHAES - ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT: AIRBNB] FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
